'''shachaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zebrafinch|zebrafinch]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ch-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zebrafinch|zebrafinch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shachaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæchæbæth|shæchæbæth]] || [[word:shæchæbæj|shæchæbæj]] || [[word:shæchæbæsh|shæchæbæsh]] || [[word:shæchæbæ|shæchæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shachachabath|shachachabath]] || [[word:shachachabaj|shachachabaj]] || [[word:shachachabash|shachachabash]] || [[word:shachachaba|shachachaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shachabath|shachabath]] || [[word:shachabaj|shachabaj]] || [[word:shachabash|shachabash]] || [[word:shachaba|shachaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shachafbath|shachafbath]] || [[word:shachafbaj|shachafbaj]] || [[word:shachafbash|shachafbash]] || [[word:shachafbaf|shachafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shachabatha|shachabatha]] || [[word:shachabaja|shachabaja]] || [[word:shachabasha|shachabasha]] || [[word:shachabaka|shachabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shachabath|shachabath]] || [[word:shachabaj|shachabaj]] || [[word:shachabash|shachabash]] || [[word:shachaba|shachaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shachabathal|shachabathal]] || [[word:shachabajal|shachabajal]] || [[word:shachabashal|shachabashal]] || [[word:shachabakal|shachabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shachabathatha|shachabathatha]] || [[word:shachabajaja|shachabajaja]] || [[word:shachabashasha|shachabashasha]] || [[word:shachabaka|shachabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shachabathan|shachabathan]] || [[word:shachabajan|shachabajan]] || [[word:shachabashan|shachabashan]] || [[word:shachabakan|shachabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shachabathaoro|shachabathaoro]] || [[word:shachabajaoro|shachabajaoro]] || [[word:shachabashaoro|shachabashaoro]] || [[word:shachabakaoro|shachabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
